zapier alternatives for small business owners — Complete Guide [2026]

AI AI Tools Idea · May 17, 2026 · Updated May 17, 2026
— min read
Affiliate disclosure: This article contains affiliate links. We may earn a commission if you sign up through our links — at no extra cost to you. Learn more →
⚡ Automation

As a small business owner, you’re likely tired of wasting time on repetitive tasks and manually switching between different apps to get things done. You need a way to automate your workflow and focus on growing your business. That’s where Zapier alternatives come in - a range of tools designed to help you streamline your operations and increase productivity.

Zapier is a popular automation tool that allows you to connect different apps and services, automating tasks and workflows. However, it may not be the best fit for every small business owner. If you’re looking for Zapier alternatives, you’re in the right place. In this article, we’ll explore the best options available, including both free and paid tools.

Why Switch from Zapier?

There are several reasons why you might want to switch from Zapier to an alternative tool. Here are a few:

  • Cost: Zapier can be expensive, especially for small businesses with limited budgets. As of 2026, Zapier’s pricing plans start at $19.99 per month for the “Starter” plan, which includes 100 tasks per month. If you need more tasks or features, you’ll need to upgrade to a higher plan, which can cost up to $599 per month.
  • Complexity: Zapier can be complex to use, especially for non-technical users. If you’re not familiar with automation tools or don’t have the time to learn, you may find Zapier overwhelming.
  • Limited features: Zapier may not have all the features you need to automate your workflow. For example, if you need to automate tasks that involve multiple steps or conditional logic, you may find Zapier’s features limited.

Zapier Alternatives Comparison Table

Here’s a comparison table of some popular Zapier alternatives:

ToolPricingFeaturesFree Trial
Zapier$19.99 - $599 per monthAutomated workflows, app integration, task automationTry Zapier free
Automator$9.99 - $49 per monthAutomated workflows, app integration, task automation14-day free trial
IFTTTFreeAutomated workflows, app integration, task automationNo free trial needed
Microsoft Power Automate$15 - $40 per monthAutomated workflows, app integration, task automationTry Power Automate free
Integromat$9 - $299 per monthAutomated workflows, app integration, task automation14-day free trial

Free Zapier Alternatives

If you’re on a tight budget, you may be looking for free Zapier alternatives. Here are a few options:

  • IFTTT (If This Then That): IFTTT is a free tool that allows you to automate workflows and tasks by creating “applets” that connect different apps and services. IFTTT has a wide range of applets available, including ones for popular services like Facebook, Twitter, and Google Drive.
  • Zapier’s free plan: Zapier offers a free plan that includes 100 tasks per month. While this plan is limited, it’s a good option if you only need to automate a few tasks.

Pro tip: If you’re using a free Zapier alternative, be sure to check the limitations of the plan and see if it meets your needs. You may find that you need to upgrade to a paid plan to get the features you need.

Paid Zapier Alternatives

If you’re willing to pay for a Zapier alternative, here are a few options:

  • Automator: Automator is a paid tool that offers automated workflows, app integration, and task automation. As of 2026, Automator’s pricing plans start at $9.99 per month for the “Personal” plan, which includes 100 tasks per month.
  • Integromat: Integromat is a paid tool that offers automated workflows, app integration, and task automation. As of 2026, Integromat’s pricing plans start at $9 per month for the “Free” plan, which includes 100 operations per month.
  • Microsoft Power Automate: Microsoft Power Automate is a paid tool that offers automated workflows, app integration, and task automation. As of 2026, Microsoft Power Automate’s pricing plans start at $15 per month for the “Per User” plan, which includes 4000 steps per user per month.

Pro tip: When choosing a paid Zapier alternative, be sure to consider the cost and features of each tool. You may find that a more expensive tool offers more features and better support, but it’s also important to consider your budget and needs.

Pro tip: If you’re already using a tool like Microsoft Office or Google Workspace, you may want to consider using a Zapier alternative that integrates with those tools. For example, Microsoft Power Automate integrates seamlessly with Microsoft Office, while Automator integrates with Google Workspace.

Conclusion Alternatives

In conclusion, there are many Zapier alternatives available for small business owners. Whether you’re looking for a free or paid tool, there’s an option out there that can help you automate your workflow and increase productivity. Be sure to consider your needs and budget when choosing a tool, and don’t be afraid to try out a few different options to see which one works best for you. You can Try Zapier free or explore other alternatives to find the best fit for your business.
